name: Ecco Ride
owner_or_parent: Ecco Ride LLC (Port Washington, WI) - multi-state consortium/platform; founding members include Kobussen Bus (Joe Kobussen, WI) and Birnie Bus Service (NY)
principals: Joe Kobussen (Kobussen Bus, founding member); Ryan Johnson (contact); local LA manager Wanda Fools per Summit data
recent_news: Parent platform Ecco Ride continues to win district contracts across MO/TN/AL/MS/LA/WI/NY/FL; Warren County TN approved Ecco Ride of Tennessee contract for 2026. Self-describes as 10+ locations growing platform.
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target. Ecco Ride LA is a subsidiary location of the Ecco Ride consortium/platform (HQ Port Washington WI), itself a growing multi-state roll-up backed by Kobussen Bus and Birnie Bus principals. Would be competitor/peer platform, not acquirable site.

name: Elite School Trnsprtn Inc
principals: Yrlay Martinez (Owner per Summit data); MN-registered Elite School Transportation LLC operates from Crystal/Maple Grove MN (different from FL address listed)
recent_news: No M&A activity found. Active small operator; USDOT 3792007 (MN entity) shows 18 power units, 13 drivers, zero crashes/inspections last 24 months as of 6/2026.
fit_notes: Data inconsistency in source: state=MN but address is Lehigh Acres FL with owner Yrlay Martinez. The website maps to a separate Minnesota company (Crystal MN). Two possible entities conflated. Both are very small (~16-18 buses). Marginal tuck-in size; verify identity before outreach.

name: Superior School Bus Inc
principals: Marisa Delcorso (CEO/owner, Brooklyn NY); Brianna Heller (Manager, NJ yard per Summit data)
recent_news: Self-reports growth from 1 bus (1988) to ~55-100 buses; $5M liability policy. Operates from Brooklyn NY HQ (957 Dean St) with Clark NJ and East Stroudsburg PA satellites. No recent M&A found.
fit_notes: Privately/family/woman-owned NYC-tri-state operator; founder-led since 1988 (~38 yrs) suggests potential succession path. Real HQ is Brooklyn NY (the NJ entity at Clark is a satellite yard). Solid NYC BOE relationship makes this a credible Summit tuck-in for NY/NJ metro expansion.

name: Elite School Bus Co LLC
owner_or_parent: independent (privately-held LLC; specific owner not disclosed publicly)
principals: Owner not publicly disclosed; operates from Conowingo/North East MD
districts_or_customers: Cecil County Public Schools (MD) - listed bus contractor
recent_news: No M&A or news found. USDOT 2823435 active: 26 power units, 33 drivers, 520,000 miles/yr (2025), 2 injury crashes in 24 months. MCS-150 refiled 3/12/2026.
fit_notes: Small (~26 buses) independent contractor on Cecil County MD list; size aligns with Summit tuck-in range. Note Summit data website 'ccboe.com' is the school district, not the company - no standalone corporate website found. Verify ownership/principals via state filings; safety record (2 injury crashes) should be diligenced.

name: Harlows School Bus Svc Inc
owner_or_parent: unknown - likely shell/registered-agent filing or distinct small entity; the harlowsschoolbus.com website belongs to Harlow's of MT/ND (founded 1973 by Harlow Hageness, operating only in ND/SD/MT/ID/WA - NOT Massachusetts)
principals: Heather Heiss (Manager per Summit data); no MA operating presence verified
districts_or_customers: Unverified; no MA school district contracts found tying to Harlow's
recent_news: No MA-specific news. The well-known Harlow's (Western US) has no MA operations per its own locations page; the Westford MA registration at 5 Technology Park Dr (a commercial office park, not a bus yard) appears to be a corporate/registered-agent filing or unrelated small entity using a similar name.
fit_notes: Likely NOT a viable target as listed. Address (5 Technology Park Dr Westford MA) is a commercial office park with no school-bus operations, and the website belongs to Western-US Harlow's which operates only in ND/SD/MT/ID/WA. Data likely conflates a defunct or shell MA registration. Skip or verify via MA Secretary of State before any outreach.
